display_text: Elder Titan Aghanim's Scepter: Causes Elder Titan to become debuff immune and gain magic resistance when the spirit returns. This is a strong anti-burst and anti-control upgrade, allowing Elder Titan to survive magic-heavy initiation attempts and continue teamfighting effectively.
search_text: Elder Titan Aghanim Scepter anti-control anti-magic debuff immune magic resistance spirit return

display_text: Elder Titan Aghanim's Shard: Lowers Echo Stomp cooldown and allows Elder Titan to swap places with the Astral Spirit during its stomp. This transforms Elder Titan into a versatile initiator, enabling unexpected positioning for stuns and disrupting enemy formations.
search_text: Elder Titan Aghanim Shard initiate positioning swap Astral Spirit Echo Stomp cooldown
